title: Backend-only admin role recovery with seeded stable principals

requirements.text: Replace the current admin principals set in backend/main.mo with a stable set seeded with BOTH of the following principals: '6ngnc-ph7ou-g23nw-z2zbr-czprs-ohpe6-2wolp-eeo7o-c32lo-deiso-yqe' and 'g3c77-j7yp6-ydsrd-2zp2q-vajyd-4ymec-tydvo-kcxwl-s7reg-37yws-eae'. The set must be declared as a stable variable so it persists across upgrades.

quotes: Replace the current admin principals set with a stable set seeded with BOTH: 6ngnc-ph7ou-g23nw-z2zbr-czprs-ohpe6-2wolp-eeo7o-c32lo-deiso-yqe and g3c77-j7yp6-ydsrd-2zp2q-vajyd-4ymec-tydvo-kcxwl-s7reg-37yws-eae

acceptanceCriteria: The stable admin principals set contains exactly the two specified principals after deployment.
The set persists across canister upgrades.

requirements.text: Update the isAdmin(caller) function in backend/main.mo to return true if and only if the caller's principal is present in the stable admin principals set.

quotes: isAdmin(caller) must return true if caller is in that set.

acceptanceCriteria: Calling isAdmin() with either seeded principal returns true.
Calling isAdmin() with any other principal returns false.

requirements.text: Update the getMyRole() function in backend/main.mo so that if isAdmin(caller) is true, it returns #admin regardless of the stored user role. Otherwise, it returns the stored user role as before.

quotes: getMyRole() must: return #admin if isAdmin(caller) == true, otherwise return stored user role

acceptanceCriteria: When called by either seeded admin principal, getMyRole() returns #admin.
When called by a non-admin principal, getMyRole() returns the principal's stored role.
No changes are made to trip schema, pricing, driver logic, customer logic, or any frontend files.

constraints: Do NOT modify the trip schema.
Do NOT modify any frontend files or dashboard UI.
nonGoals: Adding or removing any other admin principals beyond the two specified.
Changes to trip management, pricing configuration, driver/customer flows, or any UI components.
